arts.ttl: MSL club St. Louis City SC hires former Aston Villa defender Olof Mellberg as coach
arts.sum: The 47-year-old Mellberg, who made more than 100 appearances for Sweden’s national team, will replace Bradley Carnell, who was fired by the MLS club in July. St. Louis City SC hired former Aston Villa defender Olof Mellberg as its coach Tuesday.

arts.ttl: Juventus keep a close eye on Ismajli: A potential bargain
arts.sum: Juventus are actively monitoring Empoli’s standout defender Ardian Ismajli, who has been delivering impressive performances this season. In a recent match against Udinese, Ismajli once again showcased his defensive prowess, leading Empoli’s backline effectively until a late goal by Davis broke their resistance. Calciomercato detail how Empoli’s coach, Roberto D’Aversa, praised Ismajli in a post-match press conference, stating, “There is too little talk about Ismajli. We continue to do so because there is a risk we might not have him come January.” Juventus have intensified their interest in the Albanian defender, especially following injuries to key players Bremer and Cabal. arts.ttl: Emery: “Juventus strong in defence, Vlahovic’s absence may change things”
arts.sum: As Aston Villa prepare to face Juventus in a crucial Champions League match, manager Unai Emery addressed the media in the pre-match press conference. The Spanish coach offered insights into his team’s preparation and his thoughts on their Italian opponents. Emery began by encouraging the fans to enjoy the spectacle: “I advise the fans to enjoy the match. We’re in the Champions League, and this game will be a spectacle.” Regarding team news, Emery provided an update on player availability: “For the match against Juventus, we’re recovering Konsa and Kamara. arts.ttl: Cassano predicts Juventus and Milan will miss Champions League spots
arts.sum: Antonio Cassano, the former Italian striker and current social media commentator, has made a bold prediction regarding the Serie A standings. During his weekly segment on “Viva el Futbol” with Lele Adani and Nicola Ventola, Cassano expressed his views on the Scudetto race, declaring, “Inter is by far the strongest team in Italy right now. Behind them, I place Napoli.” He suggested that Atalanta could achieve a remarkable feat by finishing in the top four but emphasized that winning the title requires additional factors, particularly during the critical months of March and April. arts.ttl: Aston Villa boss Unai Emery breaks silence on Douglas Luiz transfer speculation
arts.sum: Unai Emery has brushed away suggestions that Aston Villa could look to bring Douglas Luiz back to the club after his difficult start to life at Juventus. In his pre-match press conference, Emery was asked if Villa would look to bring him back to the club.

arts.ttl: Unai Emery hoping Aston Villa can compete as they face ‘favourites’ Juventus
arts.sum: Villa will be eyeing another massive scalp after they beat Bayern Munich last month when Thiago Motta’s Serie A outfit come to Villa Park.
